name: Holo Cosmos
summary: Fly through an infinite, seeded universe — procedural deep space, navigable and native.

description.p: A real-time, navigable, infinitely-detailed space environment rendered from a tiny κ seed.

Pure procedural: a WebGL2 raymarcher computes the starfield, nebula and a distant sun from world coordinates by hash so detail is unbounded and storage is zero. The whole universe IS its seed: the same seed κ re-derives a byte-identical cosmos on every device (Law L5).

ul: Move to look around · scroll to throttle (the cockpit)
Mounts the shared <holo-space> surface the same one the desktop wallpaper uses (ADR-0080 L6)
κ-chunk streaming (L5) feeds detail on demand for authored scenes
